name: Nuformix plc
summary: Nuformix plc, a pharmaceutical development company, develops drugs using cocrystal technology in the United Kingdom. Its lead programs include NXP001, which is used for oncology supportive care; and NXP002 for use in the treatment of fibrosis. The company is also developing NXP004, which is under the pre-clinical stage for the treatment of multiple forms of fibrosis in various human tissues. It has an agreement with VistaGen Therapeutics, Inc. to develop co-crystal-based formulations of AV-101 for the treatment of various central nervous system conditions. The company also has an option agreement with Oxilio Ltd. to provide consultancy services for developing and exploiting NXP001 for the treatment of cancer. Nuformix plc was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Cambridge, the United Kingdom.
